text:
Market today: Mixed signals. Mega-cap tech/chips like Apple and Nvidia are strong, but broader tech is seeing significant drawdowns. The mood is driven by this divergence, directly impacting your highly concentrated book.

Your holdings: QQQ (-2.53%), SMH (-12.75%), SOXL (-47.66%), QQQI (-3.74%), and SPAL (-46.3%) are all flashing 'SELL' or are new with deep losses. SOXL and SPAL are leveraged and decaying, amplifying your significant drawdowns on margin.

Watch: Keep a close eye on your stops, especially on QQQ and SMH. Also, monitor broader tech sentiment given the recent sector weakness.

Bottom line: Focus on risk management and defending your capital against further drawdowns.
plays: SOXL is down -47.66% and leveraged. Review its 200 stop; consider if an earlier exit is needed to protect capital from further decay.
SMH is flashing SELL at -12.75%. Respect the 540 stop to manage further losses in your concentrated chip exposure.
QQQ is also on SELL at -2.53%. Watch its 670 stop closely to manage overall tech exposure and potential broader market weakness.
